problem id: 8ed5c9e7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) OR SHL(5)

examples:
  10011101 -> 11101110
  11001101 -> 11100110
  00111010 -> 01011101
  10011000 -> 01001100
  01011111 -> 11101111
  01001011 -> 11100101
  10001011 -> 11100101
  11110100 -> 11111010
  11111011 -> 11111101
  10011100 -> 11001110

query: 11011100
predicted answer: 11101110
